title: Select exact first LilyGO board and acquire hardware
description: Why this exists: LilyGO is a family, not a single target. Bring-up needs one exact first board/revision to avoid mixing T-Beam, T-Deck, T-Echo-like, LoRa32, and Supreme assumptions. What needs to be done: choose the first LilyGO board for LICHEN bring-up based on availability, Zephyr viability, Meshtastic support, radio chip, display/input needs, BLE/USB support, GNSS/battery/power features, and contributor accessibility. Confirm whether physical hardware is in hand; if not, create or link a hardware-access blocker. Acceptance criteria: exact board name, revision, MCU, radio, display, buttons/keyboard, GNSS, PMIC/battery, USB/UART/BLE capabilities, and source links are recorded; hardware owner/location is recorded or blocker Bead exists; non-selected LilyGO candidates are noted with reason.
notes: Selection completed 2026-06-30: first concrete LilyGO bring-up board is LilyGO T-Deck, because user has physical T-Deck hardware available and existing repo files already target lichen/boards/lilygo/t_deck plus puck/gateway app overlays. Treat R1/R1 Neo as product-shaped target but blocked on physical access; T-Deck is the live reference board. Source evidence: official LilyGO T-Deck README at https://github.com/Xinyuan-LilyGO/T-Deck notes T-Deck/T-Deck Plus scope, upload/download-mode procedure, ST7789 init caveat, and T-Deck Plus Grove/GPS caveat; official examples/UnitTest/utilities.h at https://github.com/Xinyuan-LilyGO/T-Deck/blob/master/examples/UnitTest/utilities.h records BOARD_POWERON=10, I2C SDA/SCL=18/8, BAT_ADC=4, TOUCH_INT=16, KEYBOARD_INT=46, TFT CS/DC/BL=12/11/42, SPI MOSI/MISO/SCK=41/38/40, RADIO CS/BUSY/RST/DIO1=9/13/17/45, BOOT=0, GPS shield UART TX/RX=43/44. Selection caveat: physical board revision must still be confirmed from markings/photos/logs; if it is T-Deck Plus, Grove/GPS assumptions differ and should remain board/overlay bounded.
close_reason: Selected LilyGO T-Deck as first concrete LilyGO bring-up board; recorded hardware availability and official LilyGO source references; revision-specific caveat remains for follow-up hardware-facts work.
